name: sshpad
description: SSH connection manager with GTK4/WebKitGTK UI

scripts.build: npm run ui:build && npm run c:build
scripts.rebuild: npm run ui:build && npm run c:rebuild
scripts.clean: rm -rf build sshpad && cd ui && rm -rf dist
scripts.c:rebuild: rm -rf build && cmake -S . -B build && cmake --build build -j$(nproc)
